creator: nealsid@gmail.com
text: I'm trying to boot FreeBSD 14.0 CURRENT (20230406-f21faa67ab6b-262010) on a MacBook Pro 14,1 (2017) and running into what appears to be the same issue: no keyboard after booting, either the install media or after installation. Perhaps I can help test any drivers that in-progress? Thank you.
